LeapLife is an AI-powered journal app designed for improving mental health and personal growth. It analyzes entries for reflection, action items, new questions and remembers you over time. Your data stays yours and is always stored on your own device.

Focu

Focu

Maker

@tranggpham thank you! I'd put my privacy first approach as one of the core USP's. There's a big difference between "we promise we won't read your entries" versus "it's impossible to read your entries". Pretty much everything that LeapLife does on your own machine: your entries, the long term memory all AI instructions, everything's yours. This approach prepares the product for a future where AI models will be running on user's own devices too.

Key Features:  ✨ Daily Mood Journaling: Pink Piko enhances the typical daily check-in with an AI-guided journaling experience. Each step is personalized, offering an interactive way to explore and articulate your emotions. AI-powered Tagging: Simplify the process of emotion identification with our AI. It helps you uncover hidden feelings and relevant events, ensuring you capture the nuances of your emotions without feeling overwhelmed by selecting multiple tags. Mood Trend Chart: Discover the connection between your activities and mood trends. Jon

congrats on taking this step! I really like the clean design, and the concept. having some form of insights while journaling makes it feel less like a one-way task, more like you're getting feedback. this is maybe a small thing, but I believe your privacy policy should be more prominent. sure most people never read these, but i've seen especially in the age of genAI, people are nervous that their personal data is being used to train AI engines. I'd make the privacy policy more clear, especially pointing out what is and is not sent off-platform to AI engines. best of luck on the launch!

Report

Thanks Jon! You're definitely right and I appreciate your feedback. I'll revamp the privacy policy soon.

We'd love to hear your thoughts and feedback. Give Onsen a try and let us know how it helps you on your journey to better mental health and personal growth. Thank you for your support! - The Onsen Team 🌿

Report [...] Hey Product Hunt community! We're excited to introduce Onsen, an AI-powered journaling app designed to enhance your mental wellness and personal growth. 🌟 Onsen blends personalized interactive guidance with emotional care to provide a unique journaling experience. Whether you're looking to reflect on your day, capture memories, or seek support, Onsen is here for you. Key Features: - Guided Experiences: Get insights and prompts tailored to your needs. - Journal Through Chat: Don't like writing? Let Onsen create stunning journal entries for you. - Emotional Care: Experience the warmth of a trusted friend and the wisdom of a life coach. - Voice Conversations: Capture your thoughts and memories effortlessly using voice. - AI Guides: Choose from six unique AI guides, each with a different
